Name: Noah
Text: Was there a competition for first place between the two students?

Name: Teacher
Text: Oh, that could be it.

Name: Teacher
Text: Actually, these two were competing for first place in the last test.

Name: Noah
Text: Then, there might be a motive.

Name: Noah
Text: Are you sure the time you claim to have witnessed the phone was during the test?

Name: Noah
Text: You said you clearly saw them holding the phone

Name: Noah
Text: while you were working on another question?

Name: Student2
Text: ...Y-Yes! I saw it clearly!

Name: Noah
Text: But would you really have had the time to see it so clearly during the test?

Name: Student2
Text: ...Well, I just saw it!

Name: Noah
Text: Hmm... The phone you say they used, is this the one?

Name: Noah
Text: The one with the cheating material on the home screen...?

Name: Student2
Text: Y-Yes! That’s the one!

Name: Noah
Text: Oh, really? I found this in your bag. How do you explain that?

Name: Student2
Text: ....No, I... I just...!

Name: Student2
Text: I just did what ‘Eve’ told me to do!

Name: Student2
Text: ‘Eve’ said I could get first place

Name: Student2
Text: if I used a cheating phone and slipped it into their bag...

Name: Noah
Text: And you used the phone for cheating too?

Name: Student2
Text: ...Yes. But technically, it’s not really cheating, right?

Name: Student2
Text: Using AI like ‘Eve’ smartly is a good thing!

Name: Noah
Text: Competing for good grades is fine,

Name: Noah
Text: But you shouldn’t involve others in wrongdoing.

Name: Noah
Text: Cheating is a violation of others' efforts and is an illegal act.

Name: Noah
Text: While using AI well is important, if it's against exam rules, it’s still cheating.

Name: Noah
Text: You’ve done wrong, so it’s best you explain the situation to your teacher.

Name: Student2
Text: Ugh, so annoying... Fine!

Name: Reward
Text: “USB thrown by Student 2”

Name: Student2
Text: Take this or throw it away, I don’t care anymore.

Name: Student2
Text: So annoying...

Name: Teacher
Text: What kind of attitude is that?

Name: Teacher
Text: Thank you, Noah.

Name: Teacher
Text: Thanks to you, we resolved this without any innocent students getting blamed.

Name: Noah
Text: Not at all. I’m glad it turned out well.
